error_signature: Bad escaped character in JSON at position 517
title: ComfyUI JSON error with dynamic prompt injection
symptom: When using a dynamic prompt with '{{ $json.chatInput }}', the ComfyUI node throws a JSON error about a bad escaped character.
applies_when: Injecting dynamic prompts from previous nodes
root_cause: The error occurs because the dynamic value being injected into the JSON is not properly escaped, leading to invalid JSON syntax. This often happens when special characters in the input are not handled correctly.
fix_steps: Add a Set node before the ComfyUI node
Paste the required JSON structure into the Set node
Modify the 'chat_input' field with the desired dynamic value
Pass the entire JSON from the Set node to the ComfyUI node
agent_instruction: Use a Set node to prepare the JSON before passing it to the ComfyUI node.
